description: Provenance heatmap of catalytic residue conservation across DPYS and CRMPs
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

residues = ["H67\nZn1-His","H69\nZn1-His","K159\nZn-bridge\ncarboxyLys","Y164\nsubstrate",
            "H192\nZn2-His","H248\nZn2-His","D326\nZn1-Asp","N347\nsubstrate"]
# rows: DPYS(ref), CRMP2, CRMP4, CRMP5
data = {
 "DPYS (enzyme)": [1,1,1,1,1,1,1,1],
 "DPYSL2/CRMP2":  [1,0,0,0,1,0,0,0],
 "DPYSL3/CRMP4":  [1,1,0,1,1,0,0,0],
 "DPYSL5/CRMP5":  [0,1,0,1,1,0,1,0],
}
labels_sub = {
 "DPYSL2/CRMP2": ["H","R","L","F","H","K","A","E"],
 "DPYSL3/CRMP4": ["H","H","M","Y","H","K","A","E"],
 "DPYSL5/CRMP5": ["S","H","Q","Y","H","N","D","H"],
 "DPYS (enzyme)":["H","H","K","Y","H","H","D","N"],
}
M=np.array([data[k] for k in data])
fig,ax=plt.subplots(figsize=(11,3.6))
ax.imshow(M,cmap="RdYlGn",vmin=0,vmax=1,aspect="auto")
ax.set_xticks(range(len(residues))); ax.set_xticklabels(residues,fontsize=8)
ax.set_yticks(range(len(data))); ax.set_yticklabels(list(data.keys()),fontsize=10)
for i,k in enumerate(data):
    for j in range(len(residues)):
        ax.text(j,i,labels_sub[k][j],ha="center",va="center",fontweight="bold")
ax.set_title("Dihydropyrimidinase (DPYS) catalytic/metal residues conserved (green) vs lost (red) in CRMPs\n"
             "DPYSL2/CRMP2 retains only 2/8 — the essential Zn-bridging carboxy-Lys K159 is Leu",fontsize=9)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.savefig("crmp_active_site_conservation.png",dpi=130)
print("saved figure")
print("DPYSL2/CRMP2 catalytic residues conserved: 2/8 (H67, H192 only)")
print("Lost: Zn1-His(H69>R), Zn-bridge carboxyLys(K159>L), Zn2-His(H248>K), Zn1-Asp(D326>A)")
print("=> binuclear Zn center cannot assemble; no amidohydrolase catalysis possible")
